DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT ESTILO--VP: BANKING CENTER MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LE, JACK VAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
